title: Modeuh (Fabric)
description: A little fabric-based modpack with mods I enjoy.
body:
## Modeuh
is a modpack based upon *fabric* to boost Minecraft's **performance**, **appearance** and **multiplayer**. 

## Multiplayer
The modpack focuses on **preserving the vanilla aspect** of the game while developping his **multiplayer fun** potential (Voice chat, Visual Workbench, Not Enough Animations...). The project also greatly improves performance (Sodium, FerriteCore, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, Lithium, More culling, Starlight...), *thanks to these mods even your potato pc can run Minecraft.*

## Visual and experience
It **upgrades the game's visuals** (Iris, Snow Under Trees, Not Enough Animations, Eating Animation ...). Futhermore this modpack contains QoL features (Presence Footsteps, Dynamic FPS, ClearDespawn, Smooth Swapping, Auto HUD, AmbientSounds) inviting you to a **new and immersive experience**.

## Compatibility
Although the game's mechanics remain intact, the modpack still **requires Visual Workbench on the server**. Moreover to take full advantage of the mods you'll also **want Simple Voice Chat on the server**.
